title: Kitty Cat
description: Cat follow mouse real! in your inventory!
body:
## Kitty Cat

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/m7MD6Ae7?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=1bd96a&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fkittycat)](https://modrinth.com/mod/kittycat)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1500571?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kittycat)

Bring the famous and cute [oneko](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neko_(software)) in your game!!

![Small preview of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26010a4c34604de414d4234af7d24fa6f2699a84.gif)

### Configuration

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| Enabled | Enable or disable the mod | On |
| Speed | How fast the cat moves | 4.0 |
| Stop Distance | How close to mouse before stopping | 16 |
| Size | Cat size in pixels | 16 |
| Enable Animations | Play idle animations | On |
| Alert Duration | Alert animation length | 7 |

### Mentions

- [oneko](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neko_(software)) original source of oneko
- [oneko.js](https://github.com/adryd325/oneko.js/blob/main/oneko.js) inspiration to make this mod
- [oneko cursor](https://github.com/GuidoFe/oneko-optional-cursor) for some bitmaps!

---
You can add this mod to your modpack if you wish!
